commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces MiniMax VLM and native PDF success-path JSON parsing with the shared bounded JSON reader and adds oversized-response regression tests, including a MiniMax local HTTP-server test.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +146. Total +155 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main still uses an unbounded MiniMax success-path res.json() read. I did not run a live or local OOM reproduction in this read-only review.

target.title: fix(agents): bound MiniMax VLM and native PDF provider JSON response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Three provider JSON response reads (MiniMax VLM, Anthropic PDF, Gemini PDF) use unbounded res.json() which can buffer arbitrarily large HTTP responses into memory, creating OOM risk.

## Why This Change Was Made

The error paths in the same functions already use bounded readResponseBodySnippet with explicit byte caps. This change applies the same defense-in-depth to the success paths using the established readProviderJsonResponse helper (16 MiB cap).

## User Impact

- Oversized provider responses are now cancelled mid-stream instead of fully buffered
- Error messages change slightly: malformed JSON → "malformed JSON response", oversized → "JSON response exceeds N bytes"

## Evidence

### Tests
- Added 3 new oversized-response rejection tests (18 MiB stream vs 16 MiB cap)
  - minimax-vlm.normalizes-api-key.test.ts — rejects oversized VLM response
  - pdf-native-providers.test.ts — rejects oversized Anthropic PDF response  
  - pdf-native-providers.test.ts — rejects oversized Gemini PDF response
- All 3 verify stream cancellation (canceled === true)
- Updated 8 existing plain-object mock tests to use real Response objects

### Test Results
Test Files  2 passed (2)
     Tests  30 passed (30)

### Files Changed
- src/agents/minimax-vlm.ts — readProviderJsonResponse for success path
- src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.ts — readProviderJsonResponse for Anthropic + Gemini
- src/agents/minimax-vlm.normalizes-api-key.test.ts — oversized response test
- src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.test.ts — oversized response tests + real Response fixture

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
